# Neutron

Neutron is a full-stack framework ecosystem. One mental model across web, mobile, desktop, and AI — backed by Nucleus, a multi-model database engine built in Rust.

## Projects

### nucleus/ — Nucleus Database Engine
Multi-model database in Rust. One engine for 14 data models: SQL, Key-Value, Vector, Graph, TimeSeries, Document, Full-Text Search, Geo, Blob, Streams, Columnar, Datalog, CDC, and PubSub. PostgreSQL wire protocol compatible. MVCC isolation, WAL crash recovery, production-grade persistence.
- Entry: `nucleus/src/`
- Tests: `cargo test --lib` in `nucleus/`
- Key SQL functions: `kv_get/set`, `ts_insert/range`, `doc_insert/query`, `columnar_insert`, `VECTOR_DISTANCE()`
- Vector syntax: `VECTOR('[1,0,0]')` not bare string
- Port: 5432 (pgwire)

### rs/ — Neutron Rust (Web Framework)
High-performance HTTP/1.1, HTTP/2, HTTP/3 web framework in Rust. Hyper 1.x + tokio, middleware pipeline, file-based routing, WebSockets, SSE, multipart, TLS, gRPC, GraphQL. 19 crates including OAuth, WebAuthn, Stripe, SMTP, Redis, OpenTelemetry.
- Entry: `rs/crates/neutron/src/lib.rs`
- Tests: `cargo test` in `rs/`
- Key types: `App`, `Router`, `Request`, `Response`, `Middleware`, `Handler`

### ts/ — Neutron TypeScript (UI Framework)
SSR-first TypeScript framework with Preact components, file-based routing, signals, server actions, streaming. Monorepo: pnpm + Turbo. Packages include auth, cache-redis, otel, security, ops.
- Entry: `ts/packages/neutron/src/`
- Tests: `pnpm test` in `ts/`
- Key APIs: `defineRoute`, `useSignal`, `cache()`, `revalidateTag()`, `ServerIsland`

### go/ — Neutron Go (Full Backend Framework)
Full backend framework built on `net/http`. Generic typed handlers, composable middleware, OpenAPI 3.1, RFC 7807 errors, OAuth2, WebAuthn, JWT, sessions, RBAC, API keys. Background jobs, cron, tiered cache, WebSocket hub, SSE.
- Entry: `go/`
- Tests: `go test ./...` in `go/`
- Key packages: `neutron`, `nucleus`, `neutronauth`, `neutroncache`, `neutronjobs`, `neutronrealtime`

### python/ — Neutron Python (AI Framework)
AI application framework: agents, RAG pipelines, MCP integration, structured output. Built on Starlette + Pydantic v2 + asyncpg. 22 modules covering middleware, CSRF, graceful shutdown (30s drain), OpenAPI 3.1.
- Entry: `python/`
- Tests: `pytest` in `python/`
- Key modules: `agents`, `rag`, `mcp`, `structured_output`, `middleware`, `nucleus_client`

### elixir/ — Neutron Elixir (Fault-Tolerant Backend)
OTP-based backend framework using Plug + Bandit. Fault-tolerant supervisors, all 14 Nucleus models, real-time channels with presence tracking. Idiomatic Elixir with GenServer-backed connection pools.
- Entry: `elixir/lib/`
- Tests: `mix test` in `elixir/`
- Key modules: `Neutron.Router`, `Neutron.Nucleus`, `Neutron.Channels`, `Neutron.Presence`

### mojo/ — Neutron Mojo (ML Library)
Tensor operations, quantization (Q8/Q4/NF4/FP8), inference pipeline, training stack in Mojo. Runs on CPU with SIMD kernels (337x vs scalar).
- Entry: `mojo/neutron-mojo/src/`
- Tests: `pixi run mojo build -I src test/test_*.mojo`
- Key types: `Tensor`, `Model`, `QuantizedModel`, `pipeline_generate`

### julia/ — Neutron Julia (ML/Scientific Computing)
ML and scientific computing library. Typed Nucleus client for all 14 models. Extensions for DifferentialEquations.jl, Flux.jl, Graphs.jl, CUDA.jl, and Makie.jl. Connection pooling via LibPQ.jl.
- Entry: `julia/`
- Tests: `julia --project=. -e 'using Pkg; Pkg.test()'`
- Key types: `NeutronJulia.connect`, `sql()`, `kv()`, `vector()`, `timeseries()`

### zig/ — Neutron Zig (Systems Library)
4-layer systems library (wire -> HAL -> protocols -> app). Nucleus client for all 14 models. JWT auth, compression, SSE, cache. Zero heap allocations, comptime SQL validation. Targets ARM, RISC-V, AVR, ESP32.
- Entry: `zig/`
- Tests: `zig build test` in `zig/` (295 tests)

### modelica/ — Neutron Modelica (Physics Simulation)
Physics simulation framework. FMI 2.0/3.0 model exchange, Kirchhoff's law solver (MNA), Julia bridge via DifferentialEquations.jl. Python-based tooling.
- Entry: `modelica/`
- CI: `.github/workflows/modelica.yml`

### native/ — Neutron Native (Mobile Framework)
React Native Fabric (iOS/Android) + Preact (web). Expo Go for on-device preview. Web device APIs, NeutronWind styling with 700+ design tokens. Components, router, navigation, device modules, animation, gestures, accessibility.
- Entry: `native/`
- Key APIs: Components, `NeutronRouter`, `useDevice`, `NeutronWind`

### desktop/ — Neutron Desktop
Cross-platform desktop apps using Tauri 2.0 + Preact + Neutron Rust backend. 12 Rust plugins, `neutron://` protocol bridge, Nucleus embedded mode. Dev mode TCP server for hot reload. ~10MB bundles vs Electron's 100MB+.
- Entry: `desktop/`
- CLI: `neutron desktop dev/build/preview`

### studio/ — Nucleus Studio
Visual database management GUI. Browse all 14 data models in one UI with toggles. Schema designer, code generator, database browser, MCP server with 17 tools.
- Stack: Preact SPA + Go embedded server
- Backend: `cli/internal/studio/`, Frontend: `studio/src/`

### cli/ — Neutron CLI
Universal CLI in Go + Cobra. 17 commands including `dev`, `build`, `deploy`, `desktop`, `native`, `studio`. ~21MB binary.
- Build: `go build` in `cli/`

## Transport Layer

Auto-detecting transport adapts to the runtime environment:
- **Http** — Standard HTTP client for server-to-server
- **Mobile** — Retry, cache, offline queue for React Native
- **Embedded** — Direct IPC for Tauri desktop (no network hop)

## Nucleus ORM — Per Language

Each language has an idiomatic ORM for Nucleus covering all 14 data models:

- **TypeScript**: Drizzle-style — schema in code, no codegen, fully typed
- **Rust**: Proc macros — `nucleus::schema!{}`, compile-time checked
- **Go**: Struct tags (idiomatic Go)
- **Python**: Pydantic-style class definitions
- **Elixir**: Ecto-style schemas with changesets
- **Julia**: Typed structs with `@nucleus` macro
- **Zig**: Comptime — zero overhead, SQL validated at compile time

Single schema covers SQL tables, KV stores, vector collections, timeseries metrics, document collections, graph nodes, and more — unlike Drizzle/Prisma which only cover SQL.

## Verification Suite

Formal verification across three tools:

- **Lean4** (`lean4/`): 26 files, algorithm proofs, 100% proven (Aeneas Rust-to-Lean translation)
- **Quint** (`quint/`): 27 protocol specification files, 12 test files, nucleus + framework + realtime specs
- **Verus** (`verus/`): 12 files, Rust verification for nucleus (MVCC, page, buffer) and framework (JWT, session, rate limit)

## Key Design Decisions

- Neutron TS uses Preact (3KB) not React (42KB)
- Nucleus uses PostgreSQL wire protocol — works with any Postgres client
- Nucleus MVCC + WAL crash recovery — production-grade persistence
- Neutron Rust uses hyper 1.x + tokio, no framework overhead
- Mojo uses SIMD kernels for tensor ops
- Elixir uses OTP supervisors for fault tolerance
- License: MIT (frameworks) | BSL 1.1 → MIT 2046 (Nucleus)

## File Conventions

- `rs/crates/neutron/src/app.rs` — main App builder
- `rs/crates/neutron/src/handler.rs` — Request/Response types
- `rs/crates/neutron/src/router.rs` — routing
- `nucleus/src/` — all database engine modules
- `ts/packages/neutron/src/` — TypeScript framework source
- `mojo/neutron-mojo/src/` — Mojo tensor library source
- `go/` — Go framework packages
- `elixir/lib/` — Elixir framework modules
- `julia/` — Julia ML library
- `zig/` — Zig systems library
